query_data_model.sql: SELECT * FROM screens WHERE screens.source = 'data-model' AND screens.status = 'operational'

query_by_tag.description: Get all screens tagged with monitoring

query_status_breakdown.sql: SELECT screens.status, COUNT(*) as count FROM screens GROUP BY screens.status

query_all_operational.description: Count all operational screens across all sources
query_all_operational.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM screens WHERE screens.status = 'operational'
